[2019-10-27 15:17] shadourow (Rando): Mmmh... Please consider that you're fairly new and that it was against a bad bot.

Your line seems easy to beat with a simple wall to me
[2019-10-27 15:18] shadourow (Rando): Especially in this set, doomed mech would have obliterated your line if this bot were smarter
[2019-10-27 15:19] shadourow (Rando): (for example, Tesla would also have done the trick, especially with cryo ray support)
[2019-10-27 15:22] vargus2254870 (Vargus225): hmm, you're right that it was a toss up
[2019-10-27 15:23] vargus2254870 (Vargus225): Cynestra is viable though, correct?
[2019-10-27 15:24] shadourow (Rando): Yeah, definitely, it's one of the best attacker in the game
[2019-10-27 15:24] shadourow (Rando): But that set... isn't easy honestly
[2019-10-27 15:24] vargus2254870 (Vargus225): also I have not been able to level up due to slow queue
[2019-10-27 15:25] vargus2254870 (Vargus225): also the Vivid Drone allows great stuff
[2019-10-27 15:25] shadourow (Rando): There is a code to get the maximum level instantly if you want to have access to all units. (level is supposed to help not to overwhelm new players, not to limit them)
[2019-10-27 15:25] shadourow (Rando): Vivid drone is a great econ unit too, yeah
[2019-10-27 15:26] shadourow (Rando): Oh, yeah, not enough players :/
[2019-10-27 15:26] vargus2254870 (Vargus225): Few low level opponents to beat
[2019-10-27 15:27] shadourow (Rando): You may queue in both ranked and unranked if you want
[2019-10-27 15:27] vargus2254870 (Vargus225): at least for getting to a rank that queues you to the veteran players
[2019-10-27 15:27] shadourow (Rando): By choosing the right timer on "real player" for unranked, you may avoid playing against top players 👀
[2019-10-27 15:28] vargus2254870 (Vargus225): In ranked, which is the main game mode
[2019-10-27 15:28] shadourow (Rando): Oh ! So you want to fight veterans !
[2019-10-27 15:28] vargus2254870 (Vargus225): I'd rather play high ranked players
[2019-10-27 15:29] shadourow (Rando): Mmmh... I think that you can queue in ranked while fighting a bot if you want
[2019-10-27 15:29] vargus2254870 (Vargus225): If I lose, great game, otherwise I rank up better
[2019-10-27 15:29] shadourow (Rando): (if you find an opponent, it interrupt your bot match)
[2019-10-27 15:29] shadourow (Rando): Yeah, yeah, that's a good spirit and I agree with that
[2019-10-27 15:30] vargus2254870 (Vargus225): I have queued when there are some older players, but matchmaking avoids them I think
[2019-10-27 15:31] shadourow (Rando): If you wait long enough, you'll get matched, even if it's against the #1 player, but yeah, the wait is about 10 min.
